mapper.insert: INSERT INTO access_rule (rule_code, name, enabled) VALUES (#{ruleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE access_rule SET rule_code = #{ruleCode} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE access_rule SET name = #{name}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_code AS ruleCode, name, enabled, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM access_rule WHERE id = #{id}

where.if: AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR IFNULL(rule_code, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT id, rule_code AS ruleCode, name, enabled, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM access_rule
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
